overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Chhattisgarh.

rules.title: Review Chhattisgarh Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Chhattisgarh Shops and Establishments legislation is applicable.

citations.reference: Applicable Chhattisgarh Shops and Establishments legislation

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records and notices prescribed under Chhattisgarh labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices and abstracts required under applicable labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Chhattisgarh provisions governing working hours, overtime, leave and weekly holidays.

citations.reference: Applicable Chhattisgarh Shops and Establishments Rules

rules.title: Review Labour Welfare Fund and State Notifications
rules.description: Review applicability of state labour welfare requirements, notifications and employer obligations in Chhattisgarh.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual review of registrations, statutory records, inspections and compliance obligations.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for labour compliance deadlines, renewals and statutory filings.
